assertions.title: Token icon in From input after selection

steps.expected: App loads with default tokens (USDC/WETH on Base)
steps.observed: App loaded with USDC and WETH defaults, both showing token icons
Input cleared, icon hidden (no-icon class applied)

steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown appears with USDC including logo
steps.observed: Autocomplete appeared showing USDC with logo icon

steps.expected: USDC selected with icon rendered inline in From input
steps.observed: USDC selected, img element with alt='USDC logo' rendered inline adjacent to input text

evidence.domState: fromWrapper has img.token-input-icon with alt='USDC logo', wrapper does NOT have no-icon class

assertions.title: Token icon in To input after selection

steps.observed: Input cleared, icon hidden (wrapper has no-icon class, no img visible in snapshot)
Autocomplete dropdown showed WETH with img alt='WETH logo'

steps.expected: WETH selected with icon inline in To input
steps.observed: WETH selected, img with alt='WETH logo' rendered inline in toWrapper

evidence.domState: toWrapper has img.token-input-icon with alt='WETH logo', wrapper does NOT have no-icon class

steps.action: Set From input to a token object with no logoURI property
steps.expected: Input shows token text without broken image
steps.observed: Token text 'CUSTOM (0x1234...)' displayed cleanly, no broken image placeholder

steps.expected: wrapper has no-icon class, icon display is none
steps.observed: wrapperHasNoIcon=true, iconDisplay='none', iconSrc is empty string (resolved to base URL)

assertions.title: Icon fallback when logoURI fails to load

steps.action: Set From input icon to a logoURI that returns 404 (https://example.com/nonexistent-logo-404.png)
steps.expected: Icon initially shows, then onerror fires and hides icon gracefully
steps.observed: After onerror fired, wrapper got no-icon class, icon display became 'none', no broken image visible

steps.action: Verify DOM state after failed load
steps.expected: No broken image placeholder, clean text display
steps.observed: wrapperHasNoIcon=true, iconDisplay='none', input text renders cleanly

evidence.domState: onerror handler adds no-icon class and clears icon.src, computed display='none'

steps.action: Select USDC from autocomplete in From input
steps.observed: img with alt='USDC logo' visible in fromWrapper
Screenshot val-ui-014-icon-before-change.png shows USDC coin icon

steps.action: Clear From input and type 'DAI', select DAI from autocomplete
steps.expected: Icon changes from USDC to DAI
steps.observed: img alt changed from 'USDC logo' to 'DAI logo', different icon visual (orange/yellow DAI icon vs blue USDC icon)
Screenshot val-ui-014-icon-after-change-to-dai.png shows DAI coin icon

evidence.domState: img.token-input-icon alt changed from 'USDC logo' to 'DAI logo', src updated to DAI logoURI

steps.action: With DAI selected (icon visible), clear the From input value and dispatch input event
steps.expected: Icon disappears when input is cleared
steps.observed: Icon hidden - wrapper got no-icon class, icon display='none'

steps.expected: No icon visible, placeholder text shown
steps.observed: wrapperHasNoIcon=true, iconDisplay='none', inputValue='', placeholder visible: 'Search symbol/name or enter address'

frictions.description: Browser launch required killing existing Chrome processes and removing lock files from the Playwright MCP user-data-dir before a fresh session could be started
Auto-refresh (15s interval) can interfere with testing; needed to clear it via window._refreshTimer
frictions.resolution: Called clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) at start of testing session

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-UI-010 through VAL-UI-015): all 6 passed. Token icons correctly render inline in From/To inputs after token selection, gracefully hide when logoURI is missing or fails to load, update when tokens change, and clear when inputs are cleared. No broken image placeholders observed in any scenario.
